listOfQuestions.question: Which Web Development concept is described by this clue: A programming language commonly used for web interactivity?
Which Web Development concept is described by this clue: A tree representation of a web document?
Which Web Development concept is described by this clue: An HTML element that communicates meaning about its content?
Which Web Development concept is described by this clue: A CSS layout model for arranging items in one dimension?
Which Web Development concept is described by this clue: A CSS layout model for arranging items in rows and columns?
Which Web Development concept is described by this clue: A CSS rule that applies styles under certain device conditions?
Which Web Development concept is described by this clue: Design that adapts to different screen sizes and contexts?
Which Web Development concept is described by this clue: A message sent by a client to ask a server for an action?
Which Web Development concept is described by this clue: A message returned by a server after a request?
Which Web Development concept is described by this clue: A numeric result that describes an HTTP response?
Which Web Development concept is described by this clue: Small site data stored by a browser?
Which Web Development concept is described by this clue: Persistent key-value storage in a browser?
Which Web Development concept is described by this clue: A specific address where a service accepts requests?
Which Web Development concept is described by this clue: A text format for structured data?
Which Web Development concept is described by this clue: A browser security policy for cross-origin requests?
Which Web Development concept is described by this clue: Checking submitted values before accepting them?
Which Web Development concept is described by this clue: Designing software so people with different needs can use it?
Which Web Development concept is described by this clue: Building a basic experience first and adding advanced features when supported?
Which Web Development concept is described by this clue: A markup language used to structure web content?
Which Web Development concept is described by this clue: A style language used to control presentation and layout?
